title: factsheet expedia enforcement action
text:
Expedia enforcement action
Commitments obtained by the European Consumer Protection
Cooperation (CPC) authorities
Factsheet | December 2020
Following dialogue between the European Commission and national consumer authorities, Expedia group committed to
changes in the way it presents offers, discounts and prices to consumers. Here is an overview of the commitments that
Expedia have implemented. The changes are applicable to Expedia’s brands Expedia, Ebookers and hotels.com.
The implementation of the commitments and of any requested changes is monitored by each Member State authority -
slight differences can exist in different language versions.
